_note: use:action={...} on an element inside {#each items as item, index} must emit the `__svn_action_<N>` call INSIDE the for-loop's scope so the params expression can reference `item`, `index`, or adjacent {@const} bindings. Pre-fix emit hoisted all action calls to the top of `__svn_tpl_check`, which made scope-bound names like `index` and `{@const} label` read as 'Cannot find name'. Found on a Svelte-4/5 control bench's hero component via upstream parity check.
